code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> Idle: Pet Created
    
    Idle --> Washing: Start Wash Button
    
    state Washing {Groupware_WikiPage] --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> CalculateRemaining: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerRunning: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerComplete: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning {Groupware_ChatRoom] --> SaveState
            SaveState --> UpdateUI
            UpdateUI --> SaveState: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .wash
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete {Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> CancelTimer
            CancelTimer --> ClearState
            ClearState --> SendNotification
            SendNotification --> [Groupware_ChatRoom]
        }
    }
    
    Washing --> WashComplete: Timer Expires
    
    WashComplete --> Drying: Start Dry Button
    
    state Drying {Groupware_WikiPage] --> TimerRunning2
        TimerRunning2 --> CalculateRemaining2: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerRunning2: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerComplete2: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning2 {Groupware_WikiPage] --> SaveState2
            SaveState2 --> UpdateUI2
            UpdateUI2 --> SaveState2: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState2
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .dry
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete2 {Groupware_IssueTracker] --> CancelTimer2
            CancelTimer2 --> ClearState2
            ClearState2 --> SendNotification2
            SendNotification2 --> [Groupware_ChatRoom]
        }
    }
    
    Drying --> DryComplete: Timer Expires
    
    DryComplete --> Folding: Ready to Fold State
    
    Folding --> CycleComplete: User Taps Fold
    
    state CycleComplete {Groupware_ChatRoom] --> UpdatePetHealth
        UpdatePetHealth --> UpdateStats
        UpdateStats --> ClearNotifications
        ClearNotifications --> SaveDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [Groupware_KanbanBoard]
        
        note right of UpdatePetHealth
            Pet Updates:
            - health = 100
            - state = .happy
            - lastLaundryDate = now
            - cyclesCompleted += 1
            - streak updated
        end note
    }
    
    CycleComplete --> Idle: Return to Idle
    
    Washing --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    Drying --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    
    state RecoveryCheck {Groupware_IssueTracker] --> LoadUserDefaults
        LoadUserDefaults --> ValidateState
        ValidateState --> CalculateActualRemaining
        CalculateActualRemaining --> [Groupware_IssueTracker]
        
        note right of ValidateState
            Validation:
            - endTime exists?
            - endTime reasonable?
            - Not too far in future?
            - Not too far in past?
        end note
    }
    
    RecoveryCheck --> Washing: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> WashComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Drying: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> DryComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Idle: Corrupted/Invalid
    
    Idle --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    WashComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    DryComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    
    state HealthDecay {Groupware_WikiPage] --> CheckLastLaundry
        CheckLastLaundry --> CalculateHealth
        CalculateHealth --> UpdateState
        
        note right of CalculateHealth
            Health Decay:
            daysSince = now - lastLaundryDate
            expected = cycleFrequencyDays
            health = 100 * (Groupware_KanbanBoard)
            
            State Transitions:
            100-75% → Happy
            75-50% → Neutral
            50-25% → Sad
            25-1% → Very Sad
            0% → Dead
        end note
        
        UpdateState --> [Groupware_SprintBacklog]
    }
    
    HealthDecay --> Idle: Health Updated
    HealthDecay --> Dead: Health = 0
    
    Dead --> [Groupware_KanbanBoard]: Pet Dies
    
    note left of Idle
        Idle State:
        - No active timers
        - Can start wash
        - Health decaying over time
    end note
    
    note right of WashComplete
        Wash Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Can start dry
        - Pet waiting
    end note
    
    note right of DryComplete
        Dry Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Ready to fold
        - Tap to complete
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个宠物洗衣机的状态机，核心流程是从Idle开始，用户点击开始洗涤后进入Washing状态，洗完之后要烘干，最后折叠完成整个周期。
明白了，Idle是初始状态。Washing内部需要计时器逻辑吗？比如倒计时和实时更新UI？
对，Washing里面要嵌套一个TimerRunning子状态，每0.5秒计算剩余时间，还要有个SaveState来持久化到UserDefaults，记录endTime、类型和petID。
好的，我在Washing里画了两个子状态：TimerRunning和TimerComplete。TimerRunning内部再嵌套SaveState和UpdateUI形成循环，TimerComplete处理CancelTimer和发送通知。这样符合你的设计吗？
可以，但注意TimerComplete之后要通过SendNotification连到Groupware_ChatRoom，让用户收到通知。Washing结束后进入WashComplete状态。
已添加。现在从WashComplete通过Start Dry Button进入Drying状态。Drying的结构和Washing类似，也有TimerRunning2和TimerComplete2两个子状态，同样需要持久化干燥的配置信息。
Drying的SaveState2里type要记成.dry，不是.wash。干燥完成后到DryComplete，然后进入Folding状态，用户点击折叠后进入CycleComplete。
已修正type为.dry。CycleComplete里面我画了UpdatePetHealth、UpdateStats、ClearNotifications和SaveDatabase的流程，最后连回Idle。需要在这里更新宠物的健康值和连续完成次数吗？
没错，UpdatePetHealth要把health设为100，state变成.happy，更新lastLaundryDate，cyclesCompleted加1，还要更新streak。最后ClearNotifications清理掉之前的通知。
考虑到App可能被杀死或者后台运行，我打算加一个RecoveryCheck状态，从Washing和Drying都能通过App Reopened进入，用来恢复之前的计时器状态。
很好，RecoveryCheck要先LoadUserDefaults，然后ValidateState验证endTime是否存在、是否合理，不能太未来也不能太过去。验证通过后CalculateActualRemaining计算实际剩余时间。
RecoveryCheck已经画好了，有四个出口：如果洗涤计时器还在跑就回到Washing，如果已经过期就到WashComplete，干燥同理，如果数据损坏就回到Idle。
还需要一个健康度衰减机制。Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete这三个状态随着时间推移都会进入HealthDecay，根据距离上次洗衣的天数计算当前健康值。
HealthDecay的具体计算逻辑是什么？比如健康值怎么映射到情绪状态？
用daysSince除以cycleFrequencyDays来算，100-75%是Happy，75-50%是Neutral，50-25%是Sad，25-1%是Very Sad，0%就是Dead状态。HealthDecay最后要连到Groupware_SprintBacklog记录状态。
已添加HealthDecay状态，包含CheckLastLaundry、CalculateHealth和UpdateState。如果health降到0就进入Dead状态，最终连到Groupware_KanbanBoard表示宠物死亡。
在几个关键状态上加一些注释说明吧。Idle状态注明没有活跃计时器、可以开始洗涤、健康度随时间衰减。WashComplete和DryComplete也加上相应的说明。
三个注释都加好了。我注意到Drying的TimerComplete2目前连到Groupware_IssueTracker，但SendNotification2之后连到Groupware_ChatRoom，这个和Washing那边保持一致对吗？
等等，TimerComplete2入口应该是Groupware_KanbanBoard，不是IssueTracker。IssueTracker只用在RecoveryCheck的入口。请修正一下。
已修正，TimerComplete2的入口改为Groupware_KanbanBoard。另外我检查一下所有Groupware节点的使用：Washing用WikiPage和ChatRoom，Drying用WikiPage和IssueTracker，CycleComplete用ChatRoom，RecoveryCheck用IssueTracker。
Drying的TimerRunning2入口也应该是WikiPage，这个是对的。整体结构看起来完整了，从创建宠物到Idle，经过洗涤、干燥、折叠的完整周期，加上健康度管理和状态恢复机制。
确认完成。状态机涵盖了正常流程、异常恢复、健康衰减和死亡机制，所有Groupware协作节点也都正确嵌入到对应状态中。
